response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience (TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, some Java/C++), but the role requires deep JVM expertise, strong Spring ecosystem knowledge, and genuine interest in IDE internals and language tooling. Java is listed only as a general skill with limited recent hands-on use, Kotlin and Spring are absent, and there is no demonstrated work on JVM internals, language tooling, or modern IDE subsystems. The brief C/C++ stint on LabWindows/CVI a decade ago is the only IDE-adjacent experience.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, testing, refactoring dojos)
Experience with large-scale, complex systems and developer tooling (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks)
Past exposure to IDE-adjacent work at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI in C/C++)
concerns: No demonstrated Kotlin experience and only superficial Java exposure
No Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience listed
No recent work on JVM internals, language servers, or IDE platforms

key_factors.factor: No IDE internals or language tooling experience
Strong engineering fundamentals and tooling mindset
